Section 1  
Define the function with input and output requirements.  

Section 2  
Initialize a dictionary to store the most common improvement for each age group.  

Section 3  
Iterate through each participant in the input list.  

Section 4  
For each participant, count the occurrences of each improvement in their list.  

Section 5  
Determine the most common improvement for each age group.  

Section 6  
Return the final dictionary with the most common improvement per age group.  

Section 7  
* Use a dictionary to track frequency of improvements.  
* Return the most frequent improvement for each age group.
